speaker: Yanbo Zhang
title: Vibe Research: Framework, Trust, and Collaboration
abstract: The emergence of Vibe Coding has significantly impacted the programming landscape. Analogously, we are witnessing the rise of what might be called "Vibe Research" — a paradigm where researchers increasingly leverage AI agents throughout the research lifecycle, from ideation and literature review to data analysis and manuscript preparation. This talk proposes a preliminary framework for understanding Vibe Research, examining its potential benefits such as accelerated discovery and enhanced creativity, alongside critical challenges including issues of trust, verification, reproducibility, and the evolving nature of human-AI collaboration in knowledge creation. We will discuss practical strategies for researchers looking to responsibly integrate AI agents into their workflows while maintaining scientific rigor.
